document_id: 1.DIRECTIVE (UE) 20192161 DU PARLEMENT EUROPÉEN ET DU CONSEIL.html

extracted_info.title: Directive (EU) 2019/2161 of the European Parliament and of the Council
key_requirements: Increase awareness of consumer protection laws among businesses and consumers
Improve enforcement of consumer rights and remedies available to consumers
Introduce more effective and proportionate penalties for breaches of EU consumer laws
extracted_info.penalties: More effective and proportionate penalties to deter and punish intra-EU infringements
